case_title: JENNY LOUIE VS. DAVID MELENEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, /NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ASSIGNED ATTORNEY(TRANSACTION ID # 57820441): DUNNING, SCOTT SUBSTITUTED FOR FOWLER, EMILY AS ATTORNEY FOR LOUIE, JENNY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-29-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-28-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-29-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 59058481)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-28-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE OSC (TRANSACTION ID # 58737358) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, JENNY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-29-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-17-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2016 CONTINUED TO FEB-17-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
